summary: Iteration 44 - Program Card Layout Consistency Verification COMPLETE. Both Upcoming Programs and Flagship Programs sections now share the same visual layout including gold duration badge, countdown timer, date/time pills, mode badges, early bird banner, and action buttons.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Program card layouts are now consistent between UpcomingProgramsSection and ProgramsSection. Both use same visual structure with gold duration badge, countdown timer, date/time overlay, mode badges, and action buttons.

verified_elements: Gold duration badge '21 Days' on image overlay (top-right)
Local timezone conversion in blue '3:30 PM - 4:30 PM UTC'
Early bird banner in card body
Know More, Cart, Enroll Now buttons
Gold duration badge on cards with start/end dates
Date/time overlay consistent with Upcoming cards
Registration Closed overlay on closed programs
Countdown timer on open programs with deadlines
Early bird banner on programs with offers
Know More button on all cards
Cart + Enroll buttons only on open programs

tests: Add to Cart button adds item and shows checkmark
Card image click navigates to program detail page

registration_closed_overlay.verified: Shows on cards with enrollment_open=false or expired deadlines

mode_badges.verified: Online (Zoom) and Offline badges display correctly on both card types

both_card_types_share: Image overlay structure: gradient from-black/80 to transparent
Blue color for local timezone conversion
Card body: category, title, description, tier selector, early bird, pricing, buttons

programs_without_duration_badge.note: Cards 3, 4, 6 don't show duration badge because they don't have start_date and end_date set
